svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 33px; margin-left: 900px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Dapr と Istio Ambient の責務境界の見分け方

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 62px; margin-left: 900px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 同じ Pod 近傍に在るが責務レイヤが異なる (ADR-0001 / ADR-0002)。色=レイヤ (暖色=アプリ層 / 寒色=ネットワーク層)。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 110px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 問い

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 110px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #8a6d00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8a6d00, #ab9234); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Dapr (アプリ層)
アプリが SDK で明示的に呼ぶ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 110px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1a4c80;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a4c80, #8db8e5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Istio Ambient (ネットワーク層)
アプリから見えず透過的に効く

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
アプリのソースコードに
この機能への呼び出しは書くか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
はい — 書く。
例: `k1s0.State.Save("order", order)` / `k1s0.PubSub.Publish(topic, msg)`
→ tier1 ファサード → daprd :3500 HTTP 呼び出し

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
いいえ — 書かない。
アプリは通常の HTTP/gRPC 呼び出しをするだけで、ノードの ztunnel が
iptables/eBPF で捕捉し HBONE (L4 mTLS) で運ぶ。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 機能を止めると何が壊れるか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
アプリのビジネスロジックが動かない。
例: daprd を止めると `State.Save` が失敗 → 注文データが保存されない → 機能不全。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
暗号化・認可・ポリシーが消える (ただしアプリは通信自体はできる)。
例: ztunnel を止めても HTTP 通信は流れるが、mTLS が無効化され
平文になる → セキュリティ欠陥だが、アプリ処理は継続。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
誰がコンポーネントを
直接操作・設定するか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tier1 基盤チーム (Dapr Components YAML を管理) + アプリ開発者 (SDK 呼び出し)
→ アプリ開発者は tier1 ファサード越しに触るだけ (Dapr 直接呼び出しは禁止)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
インフラチーム (istiod / PeerAuthentication / AuthorizationPolicy を管理)
→ アプリ開発者はコンポーネント自体の存在を知らなくても動く

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: どんな問題を解決するか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
「どのミドルウェアを使うか」をアプリコードから剥がす。
• State: Valkey or Postgres or Cosmos を SDK で選べる
• PubSub: Kafka or NATS or Redis Streams を SDK で選べる
• Secrets: Bao or AWS SM or Azure KV を SDK で選べる

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
「アプリ間通信の横断的品質」をアプリコードから剥がす。
• mTLS (SPIFFE identity で相互認証)
• L7 AuthZ (どの Service が何を呼べるか)
• トラフィック分割 (canary / blue-green)
• 可観測性 (L4/L7 メトリクス・分散トレース)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 520px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: どこで動いているか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 520px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Pod 内のサイドカー (daprd コンテナ) として各アプリ Pod に同居。
Pod の中に「アプリ + daprd」の 2 コンテナが在る。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 520px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Pod の外 (Node 単位の DaemonSet = ztunnel / namespace 単位の waypoint proxy)。
Pod の中には Ambient 由来のコンテナは無い — Dapr サイドカーとの二重注入を
構造的に回避している (ADR-0001)。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 610px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
視覚的な見分け方
(本プロジェクトの drawio 規約)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 610px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
暖色 (#fff2cc / #d79b00) で描画される。
アプリと同じ系統色でレーンに配置。
矢印は実線太 (明示呼び出し)。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 610px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
寒色 (#dae8fc / #6c8ebf) で描画される。
ネットワーク層レーンに配置。
Pod への矢印は点線細 (透過捕捉)。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 225), rgb(30, 24, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 692px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ef6c00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ef6c00, #de6e11); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: シナリオ: tier3 業務アプリが「注文確定」を処理するとき、Dapr と Istio Ambient がそれぞれ何をするか

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 750px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① ユーザ PWA → Envoy Gateway → tier3 Pod
(外部 → Pod 到達まで)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 693px; height: 1px; padding-top: 750px; margin-left: 356px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Dapr: 何もしない。
(まだアプリのコードが走っていない)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 750px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Istio: Envoy Gateway が TLS 終端・OIDC 認可 (ext_authz → Keycloak) → ztunnel HBONE :15008 で tier3 Pod のノードへ転送。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 813px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② tier3 業務アプリの Go コード
`k1s0.Workflow.Start("OrderSaga")` 呼び出し

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 693px; height: 1px; padding-top: 813px; margin-left: 356px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Dapr: k1s0 SDK → tier1 ファサード → daprd :3500 (HTTP) → dapr-placement でアクタ配置決定 → Temporal Worker に到達。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 813px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Istio: tier3 Pod → tier1 Pod の通信も ztunnel で HBONE 化。アプリは localhost 宛に呼んだつもりでも Pod 間は暗号化されている。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 878px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ tier1 Go が `k1s0.PubSub.Publish`
Kafka topic 'order.created' へ発行

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 693px; height: 1px; padding-top: 878px; margin-left: 356px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Dapr: daprd の PubSub building block → Dapr Component (pubsub.kafka) → Kafka Broker に発行。
アプリは Kafka のアドレスを知らない (Dapr Component YAML だけが知っている)。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 878px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Istio: tier1 Pod → Kafka Broker Pod の通信を ztunnel が HBONE 化。L7 AuthZ が必要なら waypoint proxy 経由。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 943px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
④ 顧客管理サービスが
subscribe → DB 更新

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 234), rgb(25, 22, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 693px; height: 1px; padding-top: 943px; margin-left: 356px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div: Dapr: daprd Subscribe → アプリへ POST / → アプリが `k1s0.State.Save` → daprd :3500 → Dapr Component → Postgres。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 252), rgb(22, 27, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 943px; margin-left: 1061px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Istio: daprd Pod → Postgres Pod の通信も ztunnel。Postgres Pod には Ambient が入っていないため通常 TCP で届き、Postgres 側で再度 TLS を張る。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(230, 81, 0), rgb(251, 123, 53));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1003px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5d4037;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5d4037, #c6ada5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
観察: アプリコードに `k1s0.Workflow.Start` / `k1s0.PubSub.Publish` / `k1s0.State.Save` は書かれているが、Istio Ambient に関する呼び出しは 1 行も書かれていない。
前者 = Dapr (アプリ層 / 明示呼び出し) / 後者 = Istio Ambient (ネットワーク層 / 透過適用)。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1057px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 判定フローチャート: 目の前のコンポーネントはどちらのレイヤか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1113px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div: Q1. そのコンポーネントをアプリコードから明示的に呼んでいるか?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1113px; margin-left: 601px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Yes → アプリ層 (暖色)
Dapr / tier1-3 / operation

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1155px; margin-left: 601px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div: No → Q2 へ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1113px; margin-left: 841px;

div.div: Q2. Pod 間通信の暗号化・認可・ルーティング・可観測性を担っているか?

div.div:
Yes → ネットワーク層 (寒色)
Istio Ambient / MetalLB / Envoy / DNS

div.div: Q3. 状態を保持するコンポーネントか (DB / Cache / MQ / Storage / Secret / Registry)?

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1208px; margin-left: 601px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Yes → データ層 (紫)
Postgres / Kafka / Valkey / MinIO / OpenBao / Harbor

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 728px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1208px; margin-left: 1021px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
No → インフラ層 (中性灰)
Kyverno / CNI / kubelet / containerd / scheduler / etcd (k8s 状態)

div.div: 凡例: ■暖色=アプリ層 (明示呼び出し) / ■寒色=ネットワーク層 (透過適用) / ■紫=データ層 (状態保持) / ■灰=インフラ層 (k8s/Node基盤)
